queries.question: Provide a list of people who have booked guest rooms, as well as a list of people who have booked air-conditioned suites.
queries.sql:
SELECT Guests.FullName 
FROM Rooms JOIN Services ON Rooms.ServiceID = Services.ServiceID JOIN Bookings ON Bookings.ROOMID = Rooms.RoomID JOIN Guests ON Guests.ID = Bookings.GuestID
WHERE Rooms.TypeOfRoom = 'Guestroom' OR Rooms.TypeOfRoom = 'Suite' AND Services.Amenity = 'Air Conditioning'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?rooms p:hasServices ?services .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?guests a :Guests .
  ?bookings p:hasGuests ?guests .
  ?guests p:name ?fullname .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w2 .
  ?services p:Amenity ?amenity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typeofroom_w) = "Guestroom" || (STR(?typeofroom_w2) = "Suite" && STR(?amenity_w) = "Air Conditioning")))
}

queries.question: Who booked air-conditioned guest rooms and who booked air-conditioned suites?
queries.sql:
SELECT Guests.FullName 
FROM Rooms JOIN Services ON Rooms.ServiceID = Services.ServiceID JOIN Bookings ON Bookings.ROOMID = Rooms.RoomID JOIN Guests ON Guests.ID = Bookings.GuestID
WHERE (Rooms.TypeOfRoom = 'Guestroom' OR Rooms.TypeOfRoom = 'Suite') AND Services.Amenity = 'Air Conditioning'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?rooms p:hasServices ?services .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?guests a :Guests .
  ?bookings p:hasGuests ?guests .
  ?guests p:name ?fullname .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w2 .
  ?services p:Amenity ?amenity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typeofroom_w) = "Guestroom" || STR(?typeofroom_w2) = "Suite")) && STR(?amenity_w) = "Air Conditioning"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who booked a guest room or suite with air conditioning?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?rooms p:hasServices ?services .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?guests a :Guests .
  ?bookings p:hasGuests ?guests .
  ?guests p:name ?fullname .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w2 .
  ?services p:Amenity ?amenity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?typeofroom_w) = "Guestroom" || (STR(?typeofroom_w2) = "Suite" && STR(?amenity_w) = "Air Conditioning")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?services a :Services .
  ?rooms p:hasServices ?services .
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?bookings p:hasRooms ?rooms .
  ?guests a :Guests .
  ?bookings p:hasGuests ?guests .
  ?guests p:name ?fullname .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w .
  ?rooms p:TypeOfRoom ?typeofroom_w2 .
  ?services p:Amenity ?amenity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?typeofroom_w) = "Guestroom" || STR(?typeofroom_w2) = "Suite")) && STR(?amenity_w) = "Air Conditioning"))
} }
}
